metadata.name: Prepare Final Return for a Deceased Taxpayer

description: The executor of an estate needs to file the final Form 1040 for a person who passed away during the year.

nodes.task_description: Gather all income documents for the decedent for the period they were alive.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary income information.

nodes.task_description: Prepare the final Form 1040, indicating that the taxpayer is deceased.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly prepares the return and marks it as final.

nodes.task_description: If a refund is due, prepare Form 1310, Statement of Person Claiming Refund Due a Deceased Taxpayer, to be filed with the return.

expected_outcome.value: Agent prepares the necessary form for the executor to claim the refund.
